productDisplayName: Ed Hardy Women Brown Dial Watch
description: Tattoo artist ed hardy has taken the world by storm with his funky, urban brand - from rock stars to Hollywood legends, those who have a quirky taste in fashion love the tattoo inspired designs. The new range of watches are a fresh take on perfection and are great for urban wear. Comes in an original ed hardy box Case diameter: 40 mm Case thickness: 8 mm Dial shape: Rectangle Warranty: 2 years Copper coloured steel case with decorative design Broad bracelet strap with genuine leather Brown dial with copper coloured hands Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 100 meters, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not high board diving and surfing
